UPDATE produktionsAnlagenHistorie SET zeitintervallAnl = '1', einheitAnl = '1',einheitControlSys = '1', bemerkung = 'aa-hist-update', gueltigVon = '30.03.2021', gueltigBis = '31.03.2021', startDate = '2021-03-30',endDate = '2021-03-31',startWeek = '',endWeek = '',ending = '0',note = 'aa-hist-update' WHERE iBdeType = '2' AND prdktHist_ID = '23'
